description_long: This is a medium-sized, muscular dog with a robust build and a short, coarse coat covered in dark brown and black spots. Its head is broad with a pronounced muzzle, and the eyes are set forward, giving it a focused, intense expression. The ears are rounded and set high on the head, standing upright but with a slight outward flare. The body is deep-chested and powerful, with strong, sturdy legs and a slightly arched back. The tail is relatively short, tapering, and held straight and low. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a wild canid, with features similar to those of a hyena, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A muscular, spotted dog with a broad head, upright rounded ears, and a short, straight tail. Its coat is brown with black spots and it has a powerful, wild canid-like build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, intense eyes, and upright rounded ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spotted coat, muscular body, and straight, low tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tapering tail, strong hind legs, and spotted back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the body shape and coat pattern.
attribute_breed: Spotted Hyena (Crocuta crocuta) - not a domestic dog, but a wild canid-like animal
